script: for B in emily-claude neil-claude stephanie-claude; do F=/home/azureuser/${B}-responder.py; echo "========== $B =========="; if grep -q 'YOO_AAD_ID' $F; then echo '  YOO_AAD_ID already present — skip'; continue; fi; cp -f $F $F.bak-yoo-$(date +%s); sed -i 's|^USER_AAD_ID = \(".*"\)$|USER_AAD_ID = \1\nYOO_AAD_ID = "e0d48eb4-1eb3-4263-a72e-f6ad4ef32238"|' $F; sed -i 's|if frm.get("aadObjectId", "") != USER_AAD_ID: return False|if frm.get("aadObjectId", "") not in (USER_AAD_ID, YOO_AAD_ID): return False|' $F; echo '  AFTER:'; grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|aadObjectId' $F | head -4; sudo systemctl restart ${B}-responder.service && systemctl is-active ${B}-responder.service; echo; done
